title: cyperus aggregatus var. aggregatus
intro: Cyperus aggregatus var. aggregatus, also known as the clustered flatsedge, is a variety of sedge plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family, characterized by its distinctive growth habit and rounded, green stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus aggregatus var. aggregatus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
